text: Root-caused analytically (8 clean isolated reproduction runs — too rare to catch by sweep): multiplicationAssociates compared a*(b*c) vs (a*b)*c at rel*max(1,|result|) tolerance; catastrophic cancellation (result ~0.1 from ~2e9 intermediates with entries up to 1e3, dims to 4) makes the association orders legitimately differ by ~eps*intermediate ~1e-6 >> 1e-9. FMA reassociation (f965566) raised the incidence. Fix: tolerance scales with maxAbs(a)*maxAbs(b)*maxAbs(c)*(inner dims) — 1e-12*scale, still ~10 orders below a real bug — plus a deterministic cancellation regression test. Laws 30/30 both platforms, committed.
